text: I've been a bit tired and anxious about it, wanted to get checked.
label: common_cold/discharge

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 2 day(s) in.
label: influenza/mild

text: My chest really hurts when I cough or take a deep breath. Quite a bit of phlegm, fever, feeling weak. 5 day(s), and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared. Breathing is very laboured.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 8 day(s) now. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s), though I notice it's not improving.
label: influenza/mild

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 8 day(s) now. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 8 day(s) ago.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I feel like something might be wrong — I can't put my finger on it.
label: non-infectious

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 10 day(s) like this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe
